title: Under Pressure
album: 1995-10-11: Riverport Amphitheatre, Maryland Heights, MO, USA
why_this_song: Under Pressure by David Bowie (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Can't we give ourselves one more chance?"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Pressure, pushing down on me"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Splits a family in two, puts people on streets"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Splits a family in two, puts people on streets"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Under pressure that burns a building down"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Pressure on people, people on streets
Chippin' around, kick my brains around the floor
These are the days, it never rains but it pours

excerpts.text: Pressing down on you, no man ask for
Tomorrow gets me higher, higher, high!
Insanity laughs, under pressure we're cracking

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Under Pressure" was released in 1981. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Under Pressure" foi lançada em 1981. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
